page: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance powered by the custom AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processor architecture. It features 48 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz, with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with 30,000 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 75 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core and memory subsystem performance. The instance achieves top-tier status in memory bandwidth tests, reaching 389.45 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 192.74 GB/sec for large-block write operations. Multi-core compute capabilities are highlighted by a Geekbench multi-core score of 23,554.0 and a Passmark database operations score of 47,318.64, both placing in the top 10% tier. However, single-core performance remains in the average tier, as shown by a Geekbench single-core score of 1,819.0. LLM text generation performance is mixed, with medium 7B model generation scoring in the top 25% at 27.9 tokens/sec, while small 135M model generation falls into the bottom 25% tier.

The i8ge.12xlarge offers high resource density, combining substantial NVMe storage capacity with a high memory-to-core ratio. This makes it a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring high-throughput local storage and rapid memory access without the overhead of hyperthreading. The instance is suited for large-scale database operations, high-throughput static web serving, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized server instance powered by 48 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz. It features 384.0 GB of RAM and a substantial 30,000 GB local NVMe SSD storage array, supported by a 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, multi-core processing, and database operations, though single-core execution speeds are average. The high density of local storage and memory makes this instance highly efficient for data-intensive workloads. It is suited for large-scale database deployments, high-throughput static web serving, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized instance with 48 dedicated Graviton cores, 384 GB RAM, and 30 TB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and memory performance.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.12xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized instance featuring 48 dedicated cores, 384 GB RAM, and 30 TB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: High-density ARM64 storage and memory architecture delivering top-tier database throughput and massive local NVMe capacity.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 physical cores at 2.8 GHz
30,000 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
384.0 GB of system memory with top-tier read and write bandwidth
75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor
Suited for large-scale databases, web serving, and software compilation
